mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USERS WHERE USER_NO = #{_parameter} AND ROLE = 'OWNER'
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_STORE.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO STORES ( STORE_ID, STORE_NAME, PHONE, ADDRESS, OWNER_USER_NO, STATUS, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{storeId}, #{storeName}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{ownerUserNo}, 'OPEN', SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO STORE_INVENTORIES ( STORE_INVENTORY_ID, CURRENT_QUANTITY, SAFETY_QUANTITY, UPDATED_AT, STORE_ID, MATERIAL_ID ) SELECT SEQ_STORE_INV.NEXTVAL, 0, 0, SYSDATE, #{_parameter}, M.MATERIAL_ID FROM MATERIALS M WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM STORE_INVENTORIES SI WHERE SI.STORE_ID = #{_parameter} AND SI.MATERIAL_ID = M.MATERIAL_ID )

INSERT INTO STORE_INVENTORIES ( STORE_INVENTORY_ID, CURRENT_QUANTITY, SAFETY_QUANTITY, UPDATED_AT, STORE_ID, MATERIAL_ID ) SELECT SEQ_STORE_INV.NEXTVAL, 0, 0, SYSDATE, S.STORE_ID, M.MATERIAL_ID FROM STORES S CROSS JOIN MATERIALS M WHERE S.STATUS = 'OPEN' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM STORE_INVENTORIES SI WHERE SI.STORE_ID = S.STORE_ID AND SI.MATERIAL_ID = M.MATERIAL_ID )
mapper.select:
SELECT STORE_ID AS storeId,
'S' || TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'YYYY') || LPAD(STORE_ID, 4, '0') AS storeCode,
STORE_NAME AS storeName, PHONE AS phone, ADDRESS AS address, STATUS AS status, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM STORES WHERE 1 = 1
AND STATUS = #{status}
AND ( STORE_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR ('S' || EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CREATED_AT) || LPAD(STORE_ID, 4, '0')) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR PHONE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR ADDRESS LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY STORE_ID ASC
ORDER BY STORE_NAME ASC
ORDER BY STATUS ASC, STORE_ID DESC
ORDER BY STORE_ID DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STORES WHERE 1 = 1
AND STATUS = #{status}
AND TRUNC(CREATED_AT) >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND TRUNC(CREATED_AT) <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND ( STORE_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR ('S' || EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CREATED_AT) || LPAD(STORE_ID, 4, '0')) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR PHONE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR ADDRESS LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )

SELECT S.STORE_ID AS storeId,
'S' || TO_CHAR(S.CREATED_AT, 'YYYY') || LPAD(S.STORE_ID, 4, '0') AS storeCode,
S.STORE_NAME AS storeName, S.PHONE AS phone, S.ADDRESS AS address, S.STATUS AS status, S.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, S.OWNER_USER_NO AS ownerUserNo,
NVL(U.USER_NAME, '-') AS ownerName
FROM STORES S LEFT JOIN USERS U ON S.OWNER_USER_NO = U.USER_NO
WHERE S.STORE_ID = #{_parameter}
mapper.update: UPDATE STORES SET STORE_NAME = #{storeName}, PHONE = #{phone}, ADDRESS = #{address}, STATUS = #{status} WHERE STORE_ID = #{storeId}
mapper.select: SELECT STORE_ID AS storeId, 'S' || EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CREATED_AT) || LPAD(STORE_ID, 4, '0') AS storeCode, STORE_NAME AS storeName, PHONE AS phone, ADDRESS AS address, STATUS AS status, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, OWNER_USER_NO AS ownerUserNo FROM STORES WHERE OWNER_USER_NO = #{_parameter}
SELECT USER_NO AS "ownerUserNo", USER_ID AS "ownerLoginId", USER_NAME AS "ownerName" FROM USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{_parameter} AND ROLE = 'OWNER'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STORES WHERE PHONE = #{_parameter} AND STATUS = 'OPEN'
